name: Match & Merge: VR Jelly World
summary: Step into a squishy world of color and logic! In Match & Merge: VR Jelly World, use your joystick to guide vibrant jelly pieces through a medieval-style dungeon. Strategically match shapes and colors to fill the patterns and clear each level. With its charming diorama view and immersive puzzles, can you master the art of the jelly merge?
